TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Juan Carlos Varela ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 12, Juan Carlos Varela, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Panama ta' misuw hya' ga Juan Carlos Varela, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: *uan ¶~ ®arlos~…ē *arela rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, *uan ¶~ ®arlos~…ē *arela, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw panama ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a *uan ¶~ ®arlos~…ē *arela, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Juan Carlos Varela ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 12, Juan Carlos Varela, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Panama ta' misuw hya' ga Juan Carlos Varela, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

(minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw panama ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a *uan ¶~ ®arlos~…ē *arela, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
